feasible_domain.rule: Every control and baseline is optimized or sampled inside the same feasible domain. Mandatory coverage is a constraint, not an objective reward.

objectives.no_graph: full minus software_fractional, software_complete, and candidate_edge_touch
objectives.no_diversity: full minus separation_mean, von_neumann_entropy, quality_diversity_occupancy, and redundancy

evidence_baseline.membership: explicit roles; no aliases, name inference, sign inference, or automatic absorption of available dimensions
evidence_baseline.schema_change_behavior: fail closed on missing required, duplicate, stale nonoptional, unclassified, orientation mismatch, or group multiplicity

objectives.evaluation_rule: All selected sets are evaluated with the same full metric vector after optimization. Objective differences establish selection influence only, never better software.

search.algorithm: deterministic multi-start feasible single-swap local search
search.search_sensitivity: report unique optima, objective spread, and pairwise Jaccard stability across restarts
search.weight_sensitivity: report selected-set Jaccard stability and software-coverage stability under bounded weight perturbations

causal_gate.required: equal-feasibility implementation ablation with independent outcomes

legacy_correction.reason_invalid_for_causality: The previous control did not satisfy the same mandatory-coverage feasibility condition, while binary coverage contributed directly to the objective. Candidate-edge touch was also mislabeled as hypergraph completion.
